message:
fix(codegen): pass key register span to IdxDelete for proper index seek

Fix IdxDelete code generation to pass the key register range instead of
a pre-built record, allowing the VDBE engine to properly seek to the
index entry before deletion:

- codegen.rs: Change emit_index_deletes() to pass (idx_key_regs, n_cols+1)
  in (p2, p3) instead of building a MakeRecord and passing the record
  register. This aligns with how SQLite's IdxDelete works - it seeks
  to the key first, then deletes at the current cursor position.

- Add test_codegen_update_with_index_emits_keyed_idxdelete() and
  test_codegen_delete_with_index_emits_keyed_idxdelete() to verify
  that p3 > 0 for indexed operations

- Minor formatting fixes in cursor.rs and connection.rs

This fixes a regression where index entries weren't being found for
deletion because we were building a record instead of passing the
individual key field registers that the engine expects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
